title: Why Space Is Silent
script_summary: Exploring why sound cannot travel in the vacuum of space due to the lack of a medium.

segments.voiceover: Ever wondered why space is silent?
Sound needs a medium to travel. Think air, water, or even solid objects.
In space, there's a vacuum. No air, no medium.
Without pressure waves, sound simply can’t exist.
So, the next time you look at the stars, remember: silence reigns in the cosmos.
Curious about more science myths? Hit that follow button!
